first_run.rationale: The score is unchanged, and the justifications, strengths, and concerns are substantively identical between the two evaluations. Both versions correctly identify the same core skill gaps (Japanese language, C/kernel programming, embedded networking) as the reason for the low score. The minor differences in phrasing are consistent with normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any bias related to the change in the candidate's name.
